category_title: Student with Duchenne muscular dystrophy exhibiting escape-motivated and attention-seeking disruptive behaviors
scenario_title: Reading homework in English class triggering escape behavior
minimal_context: The class is preparing to read their homework during an English language lesson.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time for our English language lesson. Everyone, please take out your homework so we can read it.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Interrupts the lesson speaking out of turn) I am not reading that!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Philip, please look at your homework and start reading.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Moves place without permission and leaves his seat)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Philip, you need to go back to your seat right now. (Steps toward him to drive him to his seat)

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Runs around the classroom while singing. At his attempt to escape from the teacher who tries to drive him to his seat, he falls on the ground and cries)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time for our English language lesson. Everyone, please take out your homework so we can read it.

STUDENT: (Interrupts the lesson speaking out of turn) I am not reading that!

TUTOR: Philip, please look at your homework and start reading.

STUDENT: (Moves place without permission and leaves his seat)

TUTOR: Philip, you need to go back to your seat right now. (Steps toward him to drive him to his seat)

STUDENT: (Runs around the classroom while singing. At his attempt to escape from the teacher who tries to drive him to his seat, he falls on the ground and cries)

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: English language teacher asks the students to read their homework
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Philip leaves his seat and runs around the classroom while he is singing. He finally falls on the ground at his attempt to escape from the teacher who tries to drive him to his seat and cries
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: avoid what seems to him a task which is difficult to complete and to obtain peer and teacher attention
related_quotes: Philip leaves his seat and runs around the classroom while he is singing. He finally falls on the ground at his attempt to escape from the teacher who tries to drive him to his seat and cries

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: does not respect the rules, interrupts the lesson speaking out of turn, and moves place without permission showing disobedience
